title: Smoky Curry Poppy Seed Puffs
description: Crunchy, flavorful puffs filled with a smoky curry and poppy seed filling. Perfect as a snack or dessert.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together flour, poppy seeds, and sugar.
Add vegetable oil, eggs, and milk to the bowl. Mix until a smooth dough forms.
Roll out the dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter.
Place the dough circles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the dough is baking, mix smoky curry paste with a little water to create a paste.
Remove the puffs from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Fill the puffs with the curry paste and serve.
